description: Evolution metrics from t=0 to t=99

three_phase_model.phase_I_linear: t=0-30:  narrow peak, uniform derivative, initial instability
three_phase_model.phase_II_accel: t=30-70: peak broadening, tail growth, nonlinear collapse
three_phase_model.phase_III_asymp: t=70-99: broad peak, decelerating derivative, quasi-equilibrium
